description_long: This is a single clog-style shoe with a medium-height heel and a closed toe, featuring a brown leather upper accented by a row of metallic studs along the edge. The outer side of the shoe displays a vibrant, swirling orange and white pattern, adding a bold decorative element. The sole and heel are made of a tan material, likely wood or dense synthetic, with a smooth finish. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort. The shoe is slip-on, lacking any laces or fasteners, and is designed for casual or semi-casual urban wear. The overall construction suggests durability and a blend of traditional and modern design elements.
description: A brown leather slip-on clog with metallic studs and a bold orange patterned side, featuring a medium tan heel and smooth finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown leather upper, metallic studs, and tan sole with a smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the closed toe and the row of metallic studs along the upper edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the vibrant orange and white swirling pattern and the continuation of the metallic studs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel, open back, and a glimpse of the interior lining.
